assertions.description: No RF chain detection despite this being a pure RF design with four ADF7242 transceivers, baluns, diplexers, an LNA, and an SP4T antenna switch
No RF matching networks detected despite extensive RF frontend with baluns and matching components
ADF7242 transceivers not identified as RF transceivers in any signal analysis section. These are 802.15.4 radios critical to understanding the design.
SKY13322 SP4T switch not identified in RF chain despite being the antenna routing switch
No SPI bus detection for ADF7242 control interface despite SPI being the primary control bus

REVIEW: 17 false positive crystal circuits from balun modules (U8-U17, ADF7242_balun), diplexers (U6-U7, U12 HHM2293A1), LNA (U13 BGA7H1N6), and RF switch (U5 SKY13322). These are all RF components, not oscillators.
REVIEW: All 153 components have category=None despite correct component_types in statistics
REVIEW: All 17 subcircuit entries have empty neighbor_components arrays
